siteSEOInfo.title: Professional H5 Game Development Technology Guide
siteSEOInfo.description: Master H5 game development with expert tutorials, frameworks, and best practices. Learn HTML5 game creation, mobile optimization, and cross-platform development techniques.
siteSEOInfo.keywords: H5 game development, HTML5 games, game development technology, mobile game development, cross-platform games, game frameworks, game optimization, web games

categories.title: H5 Game Development Fundamentals
categories.description: Learn the essential principles of H5 game development. Master HTML5 canvas, WebGL, and JavaScript game programming for creating engaging cross-platform games.
categories.image_prompt: A professional workspace showing H5 game development with code editor, HTML5 canvas elements, and mobile devices displaying game interfaces

categories.title: HTML5 Game Framework Guide
categories.description: Explore popular HTML5 game frameworks like Phaser, Three.js, and Babylon.js. Compare features, performance, and choose the best framework for your game project.
categories.image_prompt: Multiple game framework logos displayed on screen with code examples and framework comparison charts

categories.title: Mobile Game Optimization Techniques
categories.description: Optimize H5 games for mobile devices with performance tuning, touch controls, and responsive design. Ensure smooth gameplay across all mobile platforms.
categories.image_prompt: Mobile devices showing optimized H5 games with performance metrics, touch interface elements, and responsive design indicators

categories.title: Cross-Platform Game Development
categories.description: Create games that work seamlessly across web, mobile, and desktop platforms. Learn platform-specific optimizations and universal game design principles.
categories.image_prompt: Multiple devices (desktop, tablet, phone) displaying the same H5 game with cross-platform compatibility indicators

categories.title: Game Assets and Graphics Design
categories.description: Master game asset creation, sprite animation, and graphics optimization for H5 games. Learn efficient asset management and visual design techniques.
categories.image_prompt: Game development workspace with sprite sheets, graphic design tools, and optimized game assets displayed on screen

categories.title: Game Audio and Sound Effects
categories.description: Implement immersive audio experiences in H5 games. Learn Web Audio API, sound optimization, and creating engaging sound effects and background music.
categories.image_prompt: Audio mixing interface with sound waveforms, game audio controls, and sound effect libraries for H5 game development

categories.title: Game Performance Optimization
categories.description: Optimize H5 game performance with advanced techniques. Learn memory management, rendering optimization, and achieving 60fps gameplay across devices.
categories.image_prompt: Performance monitoring dashboard showing FPS metrics, memory usage, and optimization tools for H5 game development

categories.title: H5 Game Monetization Strategies
categories.description: Implement effective monetization strategies for H5 games. Learn in-app purchases, advertising integration, and revenue optimization techniques.
categories.image_prompt: Monetization dashboard showing revenue metrics, ad integration examples, and in-app purchase interfaces for H5 games
